purpose: Manual and automated fixture plan for truth-grid house overlay regression testing.

current_validated_profiles.name: Baseline Validated Chart
current_validated_profiles.stress_reason: Normal baseline chart for regression sanity.
current_validated_profiles.expected_failure_mode_tested: General house continuity and normal-latitude rendering regressions.

current_validated_profiles.name: Edge Case - High Northern Birth
current_validated_profiles.stress_reason: High northern solstice-like chart that previously exposed seam-adjacent false contour slivers.
current_validated_profiles.expected_failure_mode_tested: False seam/sliver regions, house 7/8/9 identity contamination, and high-latitude rendering artifacts.

current_validated_profiles.name: Edge Case - Southern Hemisphere Birth
current_validated_profiles.expected_failure_mode_tested: Southern clipped/orphan fragments and Pacific/Australia seam-adjacent artifacts.

future_stress_fixtures.name: March Equinox Greenwich
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Equinox baseline with relatively balanced day/night geometry.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: General truth-grid consistency across all houses without solstice extremes.

future_stress_fixtures.name: September Equinox Greenwich
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Opposite equinox season from March fixture.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Seasonal symmetry regressions and house-boundary drift.

future_stress_fixtures.name: June Solstice High North
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Compressed high-north houses, seam-adjacent false positives, and Placidus edge behavior near the latitude cap.

future_stress_fixtures.name: December Solstice High South
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Southern solstice counterpart to high-north solstice stress.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Southern Hemisphere orphan fragments and false fills near southern map edge.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Antimeridian Noon Stress
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Time chosen for repeated antimeridian/world-wrap inspection.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Left/right map edge discontinuity and duplicate-world rendering confusion.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Antimeridian Midnight Stress
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Twelve-hour counterpart to antimeridian noon fixture.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Longitude-periodicity regressions and seam artifacts that depend on chart rotation.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Pacific Island Boundary Stress
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Manual QA should focus on Fiji, Tonga, Samoa, and New Zealand edge-adjacent map areas.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Small legitimate islands confused with false seam slivers.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Bering Strait Boundary Stress
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Manual QA should focus on Alaska, eastern Russia, and the Aleutian edge.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Feature identity mismatch across the antimeridian.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Cusp-heavy Morning
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Round-date chart useful for repeated cusp-boundary clicks.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Popup truth disagreements near region boundaries.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Cusp-heavy Evening
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Same date as cusp-heavy morning with rotated house geometry.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Boundary-sensitive house swaps and stale layer rendering.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Multi-planet Overlap Stress
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Fixture for Planet A/B/C combinations once broader overlay QA starts.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Color/condition-index confusion and popup debug identity mismatches.

future_stress_fixtures.name: ASC All-major Slow Path
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Uses the current high-north chart to verify async overlay behavior.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: House polygons blocked by slow ASC all-major overlay.

future_stress_fixtures.name: MC All-major Fast Path
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Fast angular overlay counterpart to ASC all-major.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Regression where MC overlay waits unnecessarily or fails to render after split requests.

future_stress_fixtures.name: High North Winter
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: High-north winter counterpart to the validated high-north summer chart.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Seasonal inversion of high-latitude house shapes and seam behavior.

future_stress_fixtures.name: High South Winter
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Southern high-latitude winter counterpart to the validated southern summer chart.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Southern cap behavior and polar-adjacent missing/false regions.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Optional Above-cap Arctic
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Optional above +/-65 polar stress outside the MVP display cap.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: Clear failure handling or intentional exclusion above the truth-grid latitude cap.

future_stress_fixtures.name: Optional Above-cap Antarctic
future_stress_fixtures.stress_reason: Optional southern polar stress outside the MVP display cap.
future_stress_fixtures.expected_failure_mode_tested: No misleading fills beyond the supported truth-grid latitude cap.
